texto: God illuminated something powerful in that moment. One e-mail represented my family of origin - a family bent toward hiding. And my new family, the one I'd forged from the ashes of my past, desperate for Jesus to help me, represents who I am today. I am loved. I am surrounded by children and a husband who cheer for me.
explicacao: Citação de Mary DeMuth sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “God illuminated something powerful in that moment. One e-mail represented my family of origin - a…” articula familia, healing, reflexao em registro de familia, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
